doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, the cited predecessor guidance is invented, and the core legal position contradicts established EDPB doctrine on pseudonymization and GDPR scope.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists; the document contains invented citations (a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014"), misattributes the IAB Europe case, and most critically takes a legally contentious position (pseudonymized data held by a non-key-holder falling outside GDPR scope) that contradicts established EDPB doctrine and Recital 26 GDPR, which the real EDPB has never adopted.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, the cited predecessor guidance is invented, and the core legal position contradicts established EDPB doctrine on pseudonymization and GDPR scope.
